invariant_classes.conditional_invariant: survival under timing/topology noise, minimal conditions, reconstruction
invariant_classes.fragile_property: persistence gain, reconstruction fidelity, closure without coupling

robust_findings: static models fail for correlation-level organization
next_phase: Phase R should test whether closure value distributions are invariant across PROCESS TOPOLOGIES — are the same closure values maintained when the number of oscillators or coupling architecture changes fundamentally?
